hooks.command: bash -c 'MODIFIED=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l); STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l); TOTAL=$((MODIFIED + STAGED)); if [ "$TOTAL" -gt 5 ]; then echo "⚠️ GUARDRAIL: $TOTAL files modified (limit: 5). Run /scope to break this down."; fi'
bash -c 'if git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q "\.go$"; then go vet ./... 2>&1 || echo "⚠️ go vet found issues"; fi'

bash -c 'NEW_GO=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep "\.go$" | grep -v "_test.go" || true); NEW_TESTS=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep "_test.go" || true); if [ -n "$NEW_GO" ] && [ -z "$NEW_TESTS" ]; then echo "📝 TDD Reminder: Go files were modified but no test files changed. Tests come first!"; fi'

bash -c 'echo "📌 TEAM RULE: Local commands (/pair, /tdd, /review, /scope, /debug, /teach, /mode) and .claude/skills/go-* always take precedence over agent-skills:*. agent-skills is consulted ONLY for lifecycle phases not covered locally (spec, ship, security, performance, ADRs, CI/CD, idea-refine, source-driven). See CLAUDE.md → Skills & Commands Hierarchy."'
